items.summary:
played for 1 week+ 
So far:
- Got 1 SSR from main story + 2 from permanent event and get 3 items to choose SSR from limited pool, but I still haven't used it
- Reach main story 4-7
- Investigator level 23
- Only use 4 SR character then 1 SSR + 3 SR from main story, all level 40
- Got 247 permanent banner gacha currency
- Got 25 limited banner gacha currency
- Got 20K currency (like Primogem in Genshin) ... this is equal to can be traded with 100 limited OR permanent banner gacha currency
- Got 34 items that restore 120 energy to grind (lowest energy needed for grind is 20, to attempt an event needs 120 energy)
- etc too lazy to list all

Downside:
- The translation is confusing but manageable
- No Wiki

Conclusion:
- 9/10 had fun
- 8/10 will keep playing
- Feels F2P enough to enjoy
- Story is fascinating and engaging
